title: Notification of Clinical Establishment Act coming into force

TTO^T, H^RI yfM=( MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health and Family Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28thFebniary, 2012 S.O. 342(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 1 ofthe Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Act, 2010 (23 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of March, 2012, as the date on which the provisions ofthe said Act shall come into force in the States of Amnachal Pradesh, Himachal Pradesh, Mizoram and Sikkim and the Union Territories. [F.NaZ.28015/92/2011-Hj ARUNK, PANDA, Jt.
